title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Samsung India Electronics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Samsung India Electronics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Samsung India Electronics has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Howrah office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Samsung India Electronics:
Samsung India Electronics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung India Electronics!
